Week 4 | Compare and Contrast Essay

Compare and Contrast Essays
A compare-and-contrast essay is a type of academic writing. In this essay type, a writer selects two subjects (objects, people, or places) and examines their similarities and differences. These lectures will guide you through the components. They will structure the essentials for crafting a compare-and-contrast essay, whether you have been writing for a while or are just beginning to write.
